metadata.description: usage-trace marketplace: Java / Python / C# field usage and call-chain tracing (查找字段使用情况, 追踪调用链).

plugins.name: usage-trace
plugins.description: Trace keyword usage, call chains, and database tables in Java/Spring, Python, or C# with an offline HTML report. Supports Chinese queries: 查找字段使用情况, 追踪调用链, 字段流向.
